# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-sqlserver
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database

  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login

  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password

  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S1
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - S3
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: The SKU name for the database

  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - Premium
    metadata:
      description: The tier of the database SKU

  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 268435456000
    metadata:
      description: Maximum size of the database in bytes (default 250GB)

  devIpAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - name: DevTeam-Office
        startIpAddress: 203.0.113.0
        endIpAddress: 203.0.113.255
      - name: DevTeam-VPN
        startIpAddress: 198.51.100.0
        endIpAddress: 198.51.100.255
      - name: Dev-Lead-Home
        startIpAddress: 192.0.2.10
        endIpAddress: 192.0.2.10
      - name: QA-Team-Office
        startIpAddress: 10.0.0.1
        endIpAddress: 10.0.0.50
    metadata:
      description: Array of development IP address ranges for firewall rules

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging
    allowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Environment name for tagging

variables:
  serverName: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  databaseName: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('serverName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-and-testing
      managedBy: devops-team
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/', variables('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-and-testing
      managedBy: devops-team
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/AllowAllAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/', parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].name)]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
    copy:
      name: firewallRulesCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('devIpAddresses'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].startIpAddress]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].endIpAddress]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 30
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverName'), '/', variables('databaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('serverName'), variables('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

outputs:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('serverName')]"

  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('databaseName')]"

  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('databaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('administratorLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('administratorLoginPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"

  resourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('serverName'), variables('databaseName'))]"

  environment:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('environment')]"
